name: AREthProvidedFieldAddConsumer
title: AREthProvidedFieldAddConsumer
syntax: long AREthProvidedFieldAddConsumer(dword pfHandle, dword remoteIPv4Address, dword remoteUDPPort, dword remoteTCPPort);
description: Adds a consumer to a provided field. Afterwards the field notifications will be sent to this consumer.

parameters.name: pfHandle
parameters.description: Provided field handle (may be retrieved by AREthGetProvidedObjectHandle)
